content: Tailscale: WireGuard-based zero-config VPN, MagicDNS for device-name routing, Tailscale SSH with ACL-based access, subnet routers for non-Tailscale devices, exit nodes for internet routing, Taildrop for file transfer, device ACL policies, identity-aware zero-trust model, automatic NAT traversal with DERP relay fallback, device posture checks. Key differentiator vs tunnel tools: full mesh network rather than point-to-relay, no central relay bottleneck for direct connections.
